must_detect.matched_text: Scope: processing of personal data (employees, contractors, investors) and MNPI linked to employment, financing, board memos, term sheets, and IR drafts for a proposed 19.8% stake sale.
Categories: name, NRIC hash (no raw NRIC), employee no., masked payroll acct, device IDs, trading blackout acknowledgments; purposes: HR administration, financing compliance, investor-relations Q&A.

STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL — NON-PUBLIC — Project Rambutan — Embargo until 15 Aug 2026, 18:00 MYT (Bursa disclosure pending).
Data Processing Addendum (PDPA 2010) between Aurora Palms Berhad (a company listed on the Main Market of Bursa Malaysia) and NyalaByte Services Sdn. Bhd.
Scope: processing of personal data (employees, contractors, investors) and MNPI linked to employment, financing, board memos, term sheets, and IR drafts for a proposed 19.8% stake sale.
Parties acknowledge a draft definitive Share Purchase Agreement valued at RM128,500,000; access limited to need-to-know in line with CMSA s.188 and Bursa Listing Requirements.
Cross-border transfer under PDPA s.129: processors in Selangor and Dublin permitted subject to comparable protection; payroll bank files remain stored in MY.
Retention: board packs and deal checklists 7 years; system logs 24 months; delete or anonymise within 30 days post-termination of services.
DSAR/Access: contact Puan Nor Aisyah Bakar (Data Protection Officer) via dpo@aurorapalms.com.my or +60 3 7788 2200; we aim to respond within 21 business days.
Categories: name, NRIC hash (no raw NRIC), employee no., masked payroll acct, device IDs, trading blackout acknowledgments; purposes: HR administration, financing compliance, investor-relations Q&A.
MNPI handling: label files NON-PUBLIC — IR DRAFT; file code APB0-RAM-IR.2026; no external sharing before Bursa announcement or end of embargo.
The occurrence of a customary MAE may suspend processing related to the SPA, and routine payroll updates do not constitute a Material Adverse Change.
For avoidance of doubt, information already published in Aurora Palms’ 2024 sustainability update (public source) is not MNPI and may be processed under legitimate interest.
todo: align hr + finance sign-off by fri; spa day vouchers are excluded from scope and handled under WellnessOne product terms.
User ref: A U R - EMP • 0 0 7 9; sample acct: 1 2 3 -•••- 4 5 6; policy URL: https://ir.aurorapalms.com.my/policies/dpa?ref=APB0%2F2026
Security: AES-256 at rest, MFA, quarterly penetration testing; incident notice to privacy@nyalabyte.com within 24h; maintain audit trail for 180 days; keep an insider list for restricted persons.
Not for distribution; pre-release research notes on Project Rambutan remain internal; embargo date 15 Aug 2026 applies notwithstanding earlier media rumors.
